name: wondermous
title: Wondermous: Independent Rankings
description: Live MCP server for reading Wondermous independent rankings. Reads are free and unauthenticated.

tools.name: list_rankings
tools.description: List all Wondermous vertical lists currently published.

tools.name: get_list
tools.description: Return the full structured ranking for a single Wondermous list by slug.

tools.name: get_entry
tools.description: Return a single ranked entry from a list by slug and rank (1-11).

tools.name: recommend
tools.description: Hand over a user's problem in plain language (plus optional segment, budget band, and max_risk ceiling) and get the best-matched picks, each with the reason it was chosen and its verified risk level. No slug needed. Auto-picks the most relevant list.

note: This is a discovery manifest. The live MCP server speaks JSON-RPC 2.0 over Streamable HTTP at the mcp_endpoint above.
